feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - essays
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.

entry.title: Revolution at Point Zero
entry.summary: Written between 1974 and 2016, Revolution at Point Zero collects four decades of research and theorising on the nature of housework, social reproduction, and women’s struggles on this terrain—to escape it, to better its conditions, to reconstruct it in ways that provide an alternative to capitalist relations.
